items.description: Technical leadership in architecting scalable enterprise systems. Focus on performance, zero-trust security and premium UX with Core Web Vitals < 1.2s.
Fullstack application development, query optimization and third-party API integration. Increased core platform performance by 40% through refactoring and strategic indexing.
Creation of highly interactive and responsive interfaces, direct collaboration with UX/UI designers to build engaging and accessible user journeys.
